patched_src:
import qiskit as q
from qiskit.visualization import plot_histogram

circuit = q.QuantumCircuit(3, 2)

# entangle cubit 0 & 1

circuit.h(0)

circuit.cx(0, 1)

circuit.h(0)

circuit.measure([0,1], [0,1])


circuit.measure([0,1], [0,1])

circuit.cx(1, 2)

circuit.cz(0, 2)
job = q.execute(circuit, backend, shots=1024)
result = job.result()

counts = result.get_counts(circuit)
plot_histogram(counts)
rationale: The original code had an issue with the qubit indices. The entanglement and measurement operations were incorrectly applied to different qubits. I corrected the qubit indices to ensure proper entanglement and measurement.

import qiskit as q
from qiskit.visualization import plot_histogram

circuit = q.QuantumCircuit(3, 2)

# entangle cubit 0 & 1

circuit.h(0)

circuit.cx(0, 1)
